description: Schema definition and log for Yash Poly Plast customer complaint records. Supports full CAPA loop: complaint receipt → investigation → root cause → corrective action → preventive action → customer response → closure.

complaint_no.description: Unique complaint number. YY=year, MM=month, NNN=sequence.

customer_id.description: C001=Arabian Petroleum, C002=Apar Industries, C003=Exsan Industries.

contact_person.description: Name and designation of customer contact who raised the complaint.

complaint_description.description: Verbatim or paraphrased description of the complaint as received from customer.

defect_ids.description: One or more defect codes from defect_catalogue.json that match this complaint.

severity.description: Critical = safety/regulatory risk or customer line stoppage. Major = functional failure. Minor = cosmetic.

immediate_action.description: Containment action taken immediately on receipt — e.g. stock quarantine, return authorisation, replacement shipment.

capa_ref.description: Reference to formal CAPA record (if raised). Format: YPP-CAPA-YYMM-NNN.

root_cause.description: Root cause determined after investigation (5-Why or Fishbone). Populate after investigation.

corrective_action.description: Action taken to eliminate the root cause for this occurrence.

preventive_action.description: Systemic action taken to prevent recurrence across similar products/processes.

customer_response_due.description: Committed date by which written response is sent to customer.

closure_date.description: Date complaint was formally closed after customer acceptance.

closed_by_role_id.description: Role that signed off closure. Typically R002=MR/Quality Manager.
